biological_replicate: Three bacterial acidophile species were used: Leptospirillum ferriphilumT DSM 14647, Sulfobacillus thermosulfidooxidansT DSM 9293, and Acidithiobacillus caldusT DSM 8584.
experimental_design: single, binary, and tertiary combinations of species
Experiments using single, binary, and tertiary combinations of the microbial species along with a sterile control were carried out in triplicates.

Three bacterial acidophile species were used.
